props.ChoiceText: You never claimed to have made gold, but once the rumor began it attracted exactly the wrong kind of attention.
props.ChoiceBio: A rumor of gold brought wealth, scrutiny, and opportunists to your door.

0.TransitionText: Because a rumor of gold brought wealth, scrutiny, and opportunists to your door, experiment and obsession still ruled your days.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Alchemist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a rumor of gold brought wealth, scrutiny, and opportunists to your door, dangerous knowledge brought you too close to power to remain only a scholar.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a rumor of gold brought wealth, scrutiny, and opportunists to your door, your alchemy altered the kind of life you were fitted for.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.
